howItWorks.intro: This shotgun choke pattern calculator uses established formulas to provide accurate results.

rules.name: Spread
rules.explanation: Tighter chokes have lower spread rates.

faq.a: Full for turkey/pass shooting, Modified for general hunting, Improved Cylinder for close shots.
Pattern density determines range. Most shotguns are effective to 30-40 yards.
